identity.name: @epdoc/terminal
identity.purpose: Terminal control utilities for CLI applications including screen manipulation, cursor control, key input handling, and interactive pagination

quickStart.pattern: Import namespaces (screen, keys, pager) and use their functions

exports.name: screen
exports.whenToUse: When you need to clear screen, move cursor, get terminal size

exports.name: keys
exports.description: Key input handling with constants and reading functions
exports.whenToUse: When you need to read keyboard input in terminal applications

exports.name: pager
exports.whenToUse: When displaying large amounts of text that needs pagination

exports.name: Keys
exports.description: Key code constants (SPACE, ENTER, UP, DOWN, etc.)

patterns.name: Screen Control
Key Input
patterns.when: Building interactive CLI with keyboard navigation

patterns.name: Content Pagination
patterns.when: Displaying large output that doesn't fit on screen
